title: Fab's Bits & Bobs
description: A random assortment of blocks items and features to make life a little easier.
body:
# Welcome!

Fab's Bits & Bobs is a mod with a collection of features that I feel would improve the game without feeling too out of place. It's not a tech mod, nor is it a magic mod.

## Features
- Building Wands: Allows for placement of blocks in a larger area. Comes in different tiers.
- Whoosh Wand: Basically a large amount of firework rockets on a stick but with a whoosh.
- Block Yoinker: Let's you yoink a block out of the world and place it down somewhere else.
- Light: A small redstone light that gives of a large amount of light without drawing too much attention.
- Powered Light: Same as the light but always powered.
- Lava Sponge: Clear lava with ease using the lava sponge, works like the regular sponge but for lava.
- Ore Miner Enchantment: It's a limited vein miner. It only works for blocks tagged as ores. It drops all the loot at the block you mined.
- Feline Aura Potion: Cut the claw from a cat and brew it up into a potion. Repels phantoms and creepers while the effect is active.
- Pusher Plate: Pushes anything that lands on it in the direction it's facing.
- Spider Climbing Limitation: Using blocktags we can now prevent spiders from climbing certain blocks. By default spiders now can't climb on any ice block or glazed terracotta.
- Cauldron Conversion Crafting: Convert powdered concrete into concrete by dropping it in a cauldron, or cool off the used lava sponge.
- XP Holder: Holds XP. Can also collect XP, toggled by right-clicking the block with a redstone torch. Also retains the XP when picked up and placed elsewhere.
- Wrench: Rotate directional blocks (pistons, dispensers, chests etc.)
## Loader Support
- Support for Forge & Fabric on 1.20.1
- Support for NeoForge & Fabric on 1.21 and up.
## Mod Support
- Architectury required to run the mod.
- Cloth Config required to use Config Screen.
- Fabric API is required when running on Fabric.
- Native JEI/EMI support.
